zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Wallace of Riccarton於1484年8月4日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾利卡頓時，他的父親Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton21歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Cathcart18歲。他和Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1559年5月9日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉享年74歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾利卡頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Wallace of Riccarton于1484年8月4日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾利卡頓时，他的父亲Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton21岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Cathcart18岁。他和Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1559年5月9日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉享年74岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾利卡頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Wallace of Riccarton was born on 4 August 1484, in Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, was 21 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Cathcart, was 18. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll. He died on 9 May 1559, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John Wallace of Riccarton est né le 4 août 1484, à Riccarton, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Cathcart, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1559, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Riccarton, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Wallace of Riccarton am 4. August 1484 in Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton 21 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Cathcart 18. Er hatte mit Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Mai 1559 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Craigie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Wallace of Riccarton è nato il il 4 agosto 1484 nel Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Cathcart, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll. Morì il 9 maggio 1559, nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Wallace of Riccartonが1484年8月4日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアリクカートンで生まれた時，父Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccartonは21歳，母Lady Elizabeth Cathcartは18歳であった。彼はLady Isabelle Campbell of Argyllとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1559年5月9日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで74歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアリクカートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Wallace of Riccarton(이)가 1484년 8월 4일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 릭카턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Cathcart(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 5월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 릭카턴에 묻혔다.

pt.4 August 1484–9 May 1559: 4 de agosto de 1484–9 de maio de 1559
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Wallace of Riccarton nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1484, em Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Cathcart, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll. Ele faleceu em 9 de maio de 1559, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Wallace of Riccarton родился 4 августа 1484 г. в местности риккартон, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Cathcart, 18. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll. Он умер 9 мая 1559 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности риккартон, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.4 August 1484–9 May 1559: 4 de agosto de 1484–9 de mayo de 1559
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John Wallace of Riccarton nació el 4 de agosto de 1484, en Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Cathcart, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Lady Isabelle Campbell of Argyll. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1559, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland.
